programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Trisha, a mother and wife, who is live-streaming her entire life. Find out what caused Trisha to storm off and collapse on stage. Did Dr. Phil almost have to call the paramedics? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Courtney who says former friend Amie fabricated several pregnancies and baby deaths. Dr. Phil asks Amie why there are no death records of her deceased children. Why did Amie walk off stage and explosively meltdown backstage? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Kourtney and Kelly who are trying to convince their mom, Karla, that she’s not Mrs. Tyler Perry, but an online scam victim, losing $100,000 of her retirement fund. Karla finds out shocking information about her online love. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil spoke with Karen & Jim desperate to remove their mooching son from their home. Kyle revealed why his parents were at fault for his financial situation. Dr. Phil enlists the help of TVs "Bar Rescue", Jon Taffer, with advice for Kyle. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Jordan, who has an eating disorder & weighs 75 pounds . Find out why Jordan's parents despise her boyfriend & they meet him on stage. Plus, Cleveland kidnapping survivor Michelle Knight reveals all the details of her wedding. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Inside the “California House of Horrors” where 13 children were starved, chained and abused by their own parents. Family, neighbors and childhood friends speak about the tragedy. Cleveland kidnap survivor Michelle Knight sends a message to the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Jessica says husband Mike is a controlling narcissist. Chloe, 16, & Zoey, 18, say dad shattered their dancing dreams. Mike says Jessica puts the girls in the middle. Dr. Phil tells mom & dad what couples need to do with children as a marriage ends.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle and Nick insist they were great parents, saying Danielle’s sister, Kimberly, “kidnapped” their child. Kimberly says these parents are drug addicts. Dr. Phil is their chance to bring their child home despite currently living in a homeless shelter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Kelly returns from a modeling stint in New York. Donna enjoys her summer with Ray, who has made an effort to make up for his past mistakes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie is haunted by nightmares about her father's suicide. David learns that his mother requires shock therapy to improve her chances of recovery. Toni throws a dinner party while her father is out of town.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie gets herself invited on a road trip with Kelly, Donna and Clare. Steve convinces Brandon to let a director film a movie at the Walsh house. Marchette tells Toni that Dylan is using her.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie accepts her marketing professor's invitation to a seminar. Bruno delivers a letter from Dylan to Toni. Steve and Clare quarrel after booking a motel room. Donna resists Ray's relentless attempts at a reconciliation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: A fortune teller sets up shop at the Peach Pit for Halloween. In spite of her questionable credibility, her presence has an impact on many couples.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan asks Toni to marry him. An earthquake rocks the major Los Angeles area, spooking Colin. Donna sees her mother in a photograph of the 1969 Rose Court contestants, but Felice refuses to explain herself.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: The guys kidnap Dylan for his bachelor party. The girls throw a much wilder time for bride-to-be Toni.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna makes the Rose Court, and her mother reveals her reasons for not supporting her in the pageant.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Colin and Susan leave for New York to spend Thanksgiving with their families. The gang decides to spend the holiday together, and David invites his mother to join them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joe rejects a plea bargain and decides to go to trial. The Associated Press picks up Brandon's story about the trial for nationwide syndication. Colin babysits for Erin while Kelly and David are at the trial.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna fills in for Lisa at a convenience store. A young boy is caught stealing a teddy bear for his brother's birthday, but Donna covers for him. Brandon alienates Nat and Susan as he gets carried away during the After Dark's charity casino night.

programme.desc: Naomi's unexpected legal maneuver rattles her fragile peace with Bill, Tyrell's crisis pits Martin and Smitty's parenting styles against each other, and Dani's escalating struggles pull Andre further into her dangerous orbit.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Naomi's renewed push for a game-changing settlement stirs tension with Bill, Tyrell's escalating bullying battle forces Martin to reconsider his parental approach, and Samantha's modeling ambitions spark a bold plan with Kat and Chelsea.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vanessa's bond with Joey challenges her marriage, Naomi arranges a family outing to support Anita, and Dani contemplates a grand comeback in fashion with a bold new venture at Pamela's side.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Doug's hidden debt to Joey edges him into dangerous territory, Eva pours herself into orchestrating Ted and Nicole's upcoming celebration, and the family gets together for karaoke night.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita grapples with an unexpected offer, Bill navigates internal firm pressures, and Dani's latest decision upends Chelsea's carefully laid plans.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani chooses her own path, Ted urges Nicole to abandon their anniversary bash for a private getaway, and Doug doubles down on a risky windfall.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole takes charge of Laura's mysterious case, Doug wrestles with his demons, and Vanessa and Joey forge a risky pact.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Doug admits his struggles with a growing gambling addiction, Bill fights to maintain power over his firm despite health concerns, and Naomi steps in to defend a combative homeless woman under Jacob's watchful eye.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Naomi struggles to gain the trust of her new client, Ashley and Derek adjust to their new living arrangement, and Leslie launches her latest scheme against the Duprees.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees kick off Ted and Nicole's anniversary party, Eva tries one last time to keep her mother in check and Kat inches closer to unearthing the conspiracy that threatens to shatter the family's big night.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Ted and Nicole's anniversary party is a night the family won't soon forget, while Ashley and Derek juggle the messy realities of moving in together. Meanwhile, Bill braces for his part in Ted's deception to come to light.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie's explosive revelations push the Duprees and Richardsons to their breaking points, sending the whole family scrambling to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole struggles with the fallout of Ted's decades-old betrayal, and Bill's covert role in burying Ted's secret resurfaces-forcing the Dupree and Hamilton families to question old bonds, and wonder if anything in theirworld remains secure.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees scramble to steady the ship in the wake of Ted's betrayal, Eva struggles to make amends, and Kat witnesses an intimate moment that could change her life.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees reel from a cascade of betrayals, Eva scrambles to hold on to what little she has left, and Kat's growing suspicion sets the stage for a reckoning that threatens to fracture the family beyond repair.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees reclaim their power with a defiant appearance at the country club, Eva makes a final plea for her mother's love, Martin begins to unravel the truth behind a haunting memory that could destroy the family's legacy.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees rally around old dreams and new truths, Eva walks into the lion's den hoping for a second chance, Dani reignites a forbidden flame, and Kat quietly prepares for war, refusing to let Eva claim a place in the family.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will a leftover become the new head of household, or will the other side of the house turn the tables? Plus see the drama that unfolded as the shocking blindside sent the house scrambling, and which besties will hit the chopping block.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Things get trippy in the veto competition. Who will win the golden power, and will it lead to another shocking veto meeting?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, who will be evicted from the Big Brother house? Nicole or Taylor? Plus, don't blame global warming, it's Kyle and Alissa that are heating things up.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Earning the Head of Household will be no walk in the park for the final 12, and another set of besties are block bound. Plus it's the muffin mystery that broke the internet.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: OTEV is back! Who will capture the veto at the Stage Roach Festival, and will it be used to save the besties on the block? Plus Muffin Gate rocked the whole world, and tonight the saga continues.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Either Daniel or Kyle will be the final non-juror sent packing. Plus, with the Festie Bestie twist ending, who will overcome the legendary BB wall competition?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will conquer conspiracy fast and emerge with power? Will the Leftovers continue to dominate, or will someone new turn the house upside down? Plus a new showmance begins to blossom.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight it won't just be the power of Veto on the line, prizes and punishments will be doled out to the house guests. Plus the Leftovers have been dominating for weeks, but are cracks staring to emerge?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, will Kyle put his showmance in the line of fire? Or will the powerful Leftovers alliance begin to crumble? Plus, the first houseguest will be sent to jury, leaving the final ten to be thrown into a new BB Fest twist that will split the house.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The Big Brother game splits in two, who will be with Michael inside and who will joins Terrane outside? Plus with two simultaneous games being played that means four house guests will hit the block.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Two separate Veto competitions will be played, who will win at Big BroChella and who will claim power at Dyre Fest? Plus which member of the Cookout returns to get in on the action?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Things get savage at Dyrefest. Buckle up for a double eviction. Who will be booted from Big Brochella and who will be dismissed from Dyrefest? What will happen when the final 8 reunite?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the Afterparty go to war with the leftover Leftovers? Plus who will be stacked with power in the most crucial Head of Household of the season? And two more houseguests will hit the block.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick goes crazy buying items in bulk that the family doesn't need at the The Big Box Club, discount super store.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Comical chaos ensues when the gang waits in line to shop at a department store on Black Friday. Here, Kevin anticipates buying a new video game, Lindsey meets a boy, relationship problems plague Martin and Terrence hopes to buy toys for charity.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: A guys' night out goes awry, resulting in lost recollections due to alcohol-fueled blackouts and the disappearance of Nick's wedding ring.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick attends his high-school reunion but must face an embarrassing incident from his past. Meanwhile, Lindsey throws a party.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick suffers a concussion.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick worries about his mortality and creates a bucket list featuring overly dangerous activities. Meanwhile, Kevin and Troy launch an underground candy ring at school.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick meets a famous actor, who shadows Nick in preparation for a role. Meanwhile, Kevin gears up for a spelling bee.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick is enlisted to host a charity walkathon. Meanwhile, Marilyn's bracelet goes missing, and the children train for their participation in the charity walk.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and others enter a contest to win a house.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: A new morning show is launched at the station, but Nick must cohost it with a self-serving reality star. Meanwhile, Marilyn moves in with the family.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Linda threatens to call the wedding off if Philip does not change the furniture in his house.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Philip allows Linda to redecorate the house in whatever way she chooses.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: After Hattie finds out that Danny got a promotion, she asks him to help pay for Linda's wedding.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Linda asks Hattie if she'll stay and help her when the baby comes, because she doubts that Philip will help with the newborn.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Danny shows Drew's cousin around for the weekend, and falls for her fast.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Troy and Danny inevitably do something stupid in Las Vegas. In the last minute, Linda's water breaks while she is 6 months pregnant.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Heartbroken, Linda has to put up with Danny's impulsive decisions.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Troy and Sam zero in on Danny.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Danny has to deal with how his friends and family feel about his wife.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Philip learns the basics of pregnancy.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Danny struggles with his mother's absence.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Hattie tries to force Linda and Troy to discuss their differences.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: The spread of certain secrets could ruin two newfound romances.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne consider purchasing life insurance.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick discovers he has high-blood pressure and looks for ways to diminish stress in his life.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick hopes to hire a golden-voiced man for voice-over work; Suzanne misplaces Gigi's expensive cashmere sweater.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick helps out a coworker by ghostwriting him love letters for a woman on a dating website who turns out to be Gigi.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The news of Sky's suspension rocks the crew while Donna can't accept her apprentice demotion. Ceaser gets political and organizes a voter drive while Q faces a reckoning when his mom visits. Ceaser declares war on Ryan from 9MAG.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser fumes over the video with Ryan and Kitty and plots revenge. Donna attempts to get her job back. Bae gets set up by a matchmaker and finds an unlikely bond with Rok. Walt and Jess' engagement party goes wheels off.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After a disastrous engagement party, Walt and Jess attend premarital counseling while the rest of the crew encourage Bae to face her biggest fear - confronting her abusive father.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the 113th crew travel to Philly for a tattoo convention and run into some frenemies. Jess has second thoughts about the wedding and Bae meets with her father one last time.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser fires his shot at Ryan and the two confront each other in a showdown. Relationship issues continue to worry Donna and Alex, while Walt has his own tale of woe. Ceaser receives news that could threaten the very existence of Black Ink New York.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: As Nina, stuck at the apartment and eight months pregnant, waits for Phor to get home, she finally decides to pack up her things and move out. Phor asks the 9MAG guys for advice and seeks solace in his music, spending more late nights at the studio.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Both 9MAG and 2nd City gear up for the Chicago Tattoo Convention, while goodbyes and new beginnings loom over the Crew. Draya and Kitty become closer allies when Charmaine continues to struggle with managing 2nd City Ink while caring for her sick father.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: 2nd City and 9MAG participate in the Chicago Tattoo Convention, but tempers flare when ex-2nd City employees, Draya and Kitty, show up, creating conflict for Charmaine. Ryan plays peacemaker, but this comes at the cost of a personal relationship.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After the dysfunction at 2nd City Ink was put on display at the convention, the crew is scrambling to understand what happened and if the situation can be fixed. Meanwhile, Ryan is welcoming a new artist to 9MAG and searching for answers of his own.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Self-care is what it's all about as Ryan steps away from 9MAG to take part in an intensive therapy retreat, Don throws a community health fair, and Charmaine is faced with another family tragedy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Neek tries to brighten Charmaine's spirits after losing her father by arranging a surprise picnic for their fifth anniversary. Charmaine reveals some big news. Ryan, fresh out of therapy and feeling brand new, approaches leadership at 9MAG with new vigor.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are still reeling from the news that the landlord wants them out of 113th in 30 days. Ceaser decides to do everything in his power to save the shop. Meanwhile, Donna has an uncomfortable chat with Tati, and Walt hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt and Jess decide on a destination wedding but when nobody responds to their invite they reach out to other friends from their past. Ceaser continues to deal with the prospect of losing 113th and the crew discovers Ted might have a wife.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt and Jess have a destination wedding in Hawaii. The 113th crew surprise the couple on the island but Ceaser gets the biggest surprise of all. Alex plans a big surprise of his own for Donna but Tati's secrets threaten to blow up everything.

programme.title: Glenn Beck Radio
programme.desc: Glenn Beck tackles progressivism with conservative solutions.

programme.title: The Steve Deace Show
programme.desc: Principled conservatism with a snarky twist served up daily.

programme.title: Stu And Dave Do America
programme.desc: News & entertainment for people who love America.

programme.title: Relatable With Allie Beth Stuckey
programme.desc: The latest in culture, news, theology and politics from a Christian, conservative perspective.

programme.title: The John Doyle Show
programme.desc: News & entertainment for people who love America.

programme.title: Sara Gonzales Unfiltered
programme.desc: Sara Gonzales, spicy Latina, brings a no-holds-barred take to news and culture.

programme.title: Pat Gray Unleashed
programme.desc: Pat Gray pulls no punches and restores common sense to a senseless world through biting analysis, unique insight and fun.

programme.title: Glenn Beck Radio
programme.desc: Glenn Beck tackles progressivism with conservative solutions.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast-paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business...

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Baez confides in Danny and asks for his help in proving her innocence after she finds a corpse in her front yard. Also, Erin struggles to find a peaceful solution when she receives harsh case notes from her boss.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank asks Erin to liaise between him and NY Governor Mendez regarding policy reform he privately backs, but can't publicly support, because it goes against police rank and file.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank takes matters into his own hands to save Gormley's career when the officer is accused of using excessive force after decades-old complaints against him become public knowledge.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Business becomes personal for Frank and his 1 Police Plaza team when Baker is assaulted on the street, as well as for Erin, when she asks her ex-husband, Jack Boyle (Peter Hermann), to represent a defendant she's prosecuting.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie faces official reprimand from Frank when he refuses to explain why he contests the arrest report of a fellow officer assaulted in the field, a rising rookie with allies in City Hall.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank and the Deputy Commissioner of Press Information, Garrett Moore (Gregory Jbara), quarrel when Garrett refuses to walk back a quote he provided to a local newspaper.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Shockwaves ripple through the Reagan family when Danny discovers that their newest family member, Joe Hill (Will Hochman), is working undercover for the ATF to bring down a gunrunning organization.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: The Reagans band together to prevent Joe Hill from being killed in the line of duty like his father when they fear Joe's cover has been blown within the gunrunning outfit he's helping the ATF bring down.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: As Danny consults a psychic to solve the murder of a young boy, Frank is at odds with the mayor over how best to protect the city from an uptick in crime following a high-profile shooting.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Tension escalates between Frank and Mayor Chase (Dylan Walsh) after Frank makes a public arrest that goes viral.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank must decide between remaining police commissioner and pursuing a new professional chapter when his old friend Lenny Ross (Treat Williams) presents him with an exciting job offer.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie faces backlash from fellow officers, when he partners with Erin and Anthony to investigate an underground bar the NYPD and FDNY use to hide their criminal indiscretions.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie and Eddie experience marital tension when Eddie allows her newly released ex-convict father, Armin (Michael Cullen), to live with them.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank causes family tension when he assigns Jamie to guard Danny after a hit is put on him, and when Frank tries to stop his cop grandson, Joe Hill (Will Hochman), from seeking revenge after he's attacked.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A judge awards itinerant horse breeder Jim Acton's beloved mare to rancher Sam Whipple. Jim tries to buy her back, but Whipple refuses his offer, after which a fight ensues and Jim kills Whipple in self-defense.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In this series' highlight, little Michael Thorpe heads to the high country to ask God to spare his critically wounded father, believing he has found Him in the form of longtime fugitive Tom Cain.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dispensary security guard is shot by an angry client who dropped his ID. A woman is injured when she crashes a stolen car into a tree. A man barricades himself inside an apartment with his mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen Dodge Ram 1500 crashes and knocks the power out. A woman caught huffing canned air in a stolen car keeps changing her story. A FLIR-equipped helicopter is used to catch fleeing juveniles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers prevent a potential home invasion when they arrest a wanted man, a passenger becomes defensive during a traffic stop, and officers help a teen recover a stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de miembros de una fraternidad encuentra un lugar cubierto de gusanos, Grissom investiga la escena y cree que un estudiante está proporcionando la carne a los gusanos.

programme.desc: Grissom es llamado por el asesinato de una joven de 17 años en el ático de un casino. Todo el equipo se ve involucrado cuando se descubre que se ha producido un secuestro junto con el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una mujer que había sido detenida por la policía aparece asesinada a tres kilómetros de la parada. No pasa mucho tiempo antes de que Robbins determine que la mujer, genéticamente hablando, no es una mujer.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Con mentiras, Oscar ha recaudado más dinero del necesario para supuestamente ayudar a la hermana de Arianna. David cree que su hermana y su madrastra mataron del susto a su padre por dinero.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: Regresa Bridget Jones inesperadamente embarazada y sin saber la identidad del padre del bebé. Los ganadores del Óscar Renée Zellweger y Colin Firth se unen a Patrick Dempsey en el siguiente capítulo de la vida divertida y sorpresiva de Bridget.

programme.title: Bodas y prejuicios
programme.desc: Basada en la novela de Jane Austen, Pride and Prejudice, en un remolino musical, la chispa se encienda (y las culturas chocan) entre una belleza de pueblo y un estadounidense rico. Una aclamada pieza del director Gurinder Chadha.

programme.title: Atrápame si puedes
programme.desc: Dirigida por Steven Spielberg y protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Tom Hanks, narra la historia real de Frank Abagnale Jr., quien antes de los 19 años estafó millones haciéndose pasar por piloto, médico y fiscal.

programme.title: El aviador
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese captura los primeros años de esta gran figura de Estados Unidos, Howard Hughes, en esta aclamada biografía ganadora del Oscar protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: El lobo de Wall Street
programme.desc: Sexo. Dinero. Poder. Drogas. Prepárate a disfrutar de una historia del legendario cineasta Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio interpreta a un corredor de bolsa en búsqueda de una vida llena de emociones, donde reina la corrupción y no hay límites.

programme.title: Regreso a Cold Mountain
programme.desc: Una historia dramática de amor en los inicios de la Guerra Civil. Nicole Kidman, Jude Law y Renée Zellweger protagonizan esta película emotiva y atrapante del director ganador del Óscar Anthony Minghella (The English Patient).

programme.title: La llegada
programme.desc: Cuando las naves espaciales aterrizan en todo el mundo, la traductora Louise Banks es enviada para descifrar su intención. A medida que aumentan las tensiones, Banks aprende la verdad y debe tomar una oportunidad que podría amenazar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Contracara
programme.desc: Gracias a un nuevo procedimiento médico, un agente adquiere quirúrgicamente la misma apariencia que un criminal con el objetivo de desmantelar su organización terrorista.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: Rico o muerto
programme.desc: Luego de un tiroteo casi fatal, Marcus recuerda su transformación de chico callejero huérfano del Bronx a dejar su marca en el comercio de la droga a asociarse con un compañero exconvicto para intentar convertirse en un exitoso artista de rap.

programme.title: Cuenta pendiente
programme.desc: Veinte años después de un robo fallido, tres estafadores secuestran a un paciente con amnesia para refrescar su memoria y encontrar el dinero que se perdió hace tanto tiempo.

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente
programme.desc: Durante la crisis económica de 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), un sicario, es contratado para restablecer el orden después de que tres idiotas roban una partida de póquer protegida por la mafia.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: El cuartel secreto
programme.desc: Charlie Kincaid descubre un cuartel general secreto debajo de su casa que parece pertenecer a un super héroe. Lo comparte con sus amigos, y ellos empiezan a creer que su padre separado podría tener una doble vida secreta.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando escapa el supervillano Shredder con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Algo salvaje
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo conservador accede a viajar con una mujer alocada y excéntrica, que lo embarca en una estrafalaria odisea que trastocará el mundo de ambos.

programme.title: GAMBIT (CBS FILMS)
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: Adventureland: Un verano memorable
programme.desc: En el verano de 1987, un recién graduado de la universidad acepta un trabajo «sin futuro» en el parque de diversiones de su ciudad, solo para descubrir que es la preparación perfecta para enfrentarse al mundo real.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Solo química (Just a Little Chemistry)
programme.desc: Una fan se encuentra dividida entre la atracción por su ídolo del cine y su mejor amigo.

programme.title: Intercambio navideño
programme.desc: Las gemelas Maya y Ana, separadas al nacer y con vidas totalmente distintas, se descubren e intercambian vidas por una noche, alterando sus destinos para siempre.

programme.title: Una estrella en Navidad
programme.desc: Incluso las estrellas se enfrentan a los mismos problemas que los humanos. Un día, la celosa Próxima derriba a la estrella lucero del cielo y ésta aterriza en un pueblo. Lucero sólo tiene unos días para volver al cielo, de lo contrario se extinguirá.

programme.title: Jesus, Maria y Jose
programme.desc: Por la presecución del Rey Herodés de Judea, el niño Jesús y sus padres Maria y José huyen por el desierto de Egipto, donde el niño aprende sus primeras letras, culminando con al iniciacíon de su vida secreta.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: Cupido no funciona
programme.desc: Holly, profesora universitaria, se inscribe en un servicio de citas románticas en línea, pero sospecha que algo anda mal cuando ve que las acciones del chico no coinciden con sus bonitos mensajes.

programme.title: Karen y los fantasmas de navidad
programme.desc: Karen es una mujer de mediana edad que, debido a su actitud exigente y arrogante, ha alienado a sus amigos y familia. Un día, Karen recibe una visita por parte de unos espíritus no convencionales.

programme.title: El perro que salvó la navidad de vacaciones
programme.desc: Un astuto can y un caniche francés deben salvar su hogar de unos tontos ladrones que atacan durante las vacaciones de Navidad.

programme.title: El mensajero de Satanás 2
programme.desc: Una antigua bestia carnívora aterroriza a un grupo universitario de jugadores de baloncesto, porristas y entrenadores que quedan atrapados en una remota autopista tras averiarse su autobús.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: Especies: el despertar
programme.desc: Helena Mattsson y Ben Cross protagonizan esta aterradora continuación acerca de una sobrina y su tío que destapan la verdad de sus raíces alienígenas como consecuencia de una oleada de masacres. Dirigida por Nick Lyon.

programme.title: Revelaciones
programme.desc: La esposa de un investigador universitario cree que su casa en el lago de Vermont está embrujada por un fantasma, o que está perdiendo la cabeza.

programme.title: La piel fría
programme.desc: Un joven llega a una isla remota para ocupar un puesto de observador meteorológico y luego se encuentra defendiendo la torre de vigilancia, contra las criaturas mortales que viven en la costa de la isla.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Rootin' Tootin' Rhythm
programme.desc: Ranch owner Gene Autry and his pal Frog Millhouse are after cattle rustlers and become mixed up in a comedy of errors when they don the clothes of two dead outlaws, only to learn that the outlaws are really dead sheriffs, dressed in outlaw's clothes!

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry's crime fighting is tested when rustlers employ modern techniques. The newspaper's scathing editorials bash Gene's methods and demand to call in big city detectives. Old methods are tested.

programme.title: Boots And Saddles
programme.desc: A British youngster inherits a ranch so burdened with taxes that he struggles to keep the property. Gene Autry befriends the boy, and becomes involved with an Army colonel's daughter and others.

programme.title: Cast A Long Shadow
programme.desc: Audie Murphy plays Matt, a troubled saddle tramp with a penchant for drinking. When he inherits a massive ranch, it leads him back into the arms of an old flame (Terry Moore), as well as into the fists some old rivals who would rather see him dead.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Cinderfella
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis plays Cinderfella – a hard-working and honest lad mistreated by his wicked stepmother and his two boorish stepbrothers. But miracles do happen when his Fairy Godfather transforms the klutzy fella into an eligible, handsome bachelor.

programme.title: The Family Jewels
programme.desc: When a poor little rich girl is suddenly orphaned, one of her six wacky uncles – all played by Jerry Lewis – will be selected as her guardian.

programme.title: Rock-A-Bye Baby
programme.desc: A TV repairman marries a Mexican bullfighter. Unfortunately, he dies the day after their wedding; fortunately, he managed to impregnate her. Unfortunately, she is starring in the epic called The White Virgin on the Nile.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: A Best Actor Oscar went to Burt Lancaster for his outstanding performance as a con-man-turned-preacher in this provocative indictment of religious corruption.

programme.title: Frank Capra's A Hole In The Head
programme.desc: Frank Capra catches lightning in bottle again when he teams with Frank Sinatra and Eleanor Parker in this heartwarming comedy about the problems of a footloose widower, his 12-year-old son, a bongo-playing showgirl and a matchmaking sister-in-law.

programme.title: Another Time, Another Place
programme.desc: Mark Trevor, a World War II newsman with the British Broadcasting Corporation who's torn between two women. One is Sara Scott, the American reporter working in England. The two embark on a romance – but it's an affair destined for tragedy.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hooterville is abuzz as the townsfolk enter a contest sponsored by Peterson's Poi Juice, with a trip to Hawaii as the top prize. But no one expects the winner to be Arnold, the Ziffels' talented pig. Maybe a pig might fly after all, to the islands!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Eb is quickly engaged to Loreli Appleby, whom he has only known for a day. Eb tries to impress Loreli's father, a farmer, but in typical fashion, he accidentally ruins his future father-in-law's cabbage crop.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to 'Old Mail Day', when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has ulterior motives when he befriends a Jewish watchmaker, who has a sure-fire invention that the world has been waiting for.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's support of hiring quotas faces a stern test when he is passed over for a promotion to a less-qualified black man. Mike confronts the hiring manager, but his big mouth gets him in trouble again.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is told by his doctor to go on a diet, or else he'll suffer serious health problems. He rejects the efforts of Edith, Mike and Gloria to stick with the diet, but Justin Quigley may provide the inspiration Archie needs.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With a lot of demands on Mike and Gloria's time - Joey needs a lot of care, and both of them working - the Stivics begin wondering when...or if they'll ever have time for each other.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol discovers she's got to show her boss more than just proficiency if she wants a promotion -- and Maude, upset, tries to save Carol from sacrificing herself.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has nothing but good intentions when she hires an ex-convict, but panics after she finds out why he went to prison.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Can one innocent kiss ruin two marriages? It looks that way when Maude and Arthur catch their spouses in an illicit embrace.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude hires an English housekeeper who arrives on the day of the charity party for 'women's rights,' but within hours Maude is trying to fire her.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Rowan & Martin's Laugh-In
programme.desc: Halloween special Boo-In sketches include Things that go bump in the night song, Ruth the fortune teller, Orson, and Alan's monster sketch

programme.title: Rowan & Martin's Laugh-In
programme.desc: Sketches including Danny meets Tyrone F. Hornie, Quickies, Scandinavian storyteller, Goldie explains overpopulation

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Rose Murphy is sexually assaulted at work by her boss and, fending off another attack, she kills him. When she confesses the shooting to her husband, he makes it look like a failed robbery. A pair of thieves are arrested, but the clues don’t add up.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Serena Grimes, the victim of a violent armed robbery, becomes obsessed with Bubba Skinner when she misinterprets his kindness for romance. Soon, flowers arrive at the station for Bubba, amusing Gillespie and the staff, until the stalking begins.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The wife of a prison inmate is shot and killed in a laundromat in what looks like a professional hit.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Jeannie's friend Nancy kills one of her rapists, Jeannie is furious at the way the justice system works.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After one of his fellow teachers is killed on the schoolyard during a fight between two students, a veteran former teacher kidnaps four troublesome students and holds them in an abandoned private school.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone is hit by a getaway van after a robbery, but manages to shoot one of the robbers. When the man dies, his wife and accomplice vows revenge against Stone.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old neighborhood has suddenly seen a huge upsurge in violent crime committed against its homeowners, including murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The case of a man's death (accident or murder?) sends Mannix to another State and in the middle of political turmoil.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix narrowly avoids being shot by a businessman who appears to be a solid citizen. The attacker claims this is due to dreams he is having based on his Korean War experiences.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix gets an urgent call from the police. Lt. Art Malcolm, Mannix's friend who also served with the detective during the Korean War, is being held hostage in an abandoned building.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Roger Bard, an Englishman who rents an office in the same complex as Joe Mannix, comes to work one day where he is first confronted by a man named Rhodes, whom he locks in a closet.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: After a man's wife disappears on their wedding day the concerned husband asks Barnaby to look into what may have prompted her to run away. While investigating Barnaby discovers the bride has a dangerous past that has come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Audrey is hired at One Eyed Jacks, but is caught in a trap when her father arrives. Cooper gets Jacques Renault to reveal the details of Laura's last night in the cabin. Deputy Andy saves Truman's life and apprehends Renault.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: A wounded Agent Cooper has a vision of a giant who gives him several clues about the murder of Laura Palmer. Shelly and Pete recover from the mill fire, but Josie and Catherine are missing.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes that remind him of his wife who jilted him 18 years ago.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of a killing in Chinatown leads them to a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest in the case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama is almost struck by lightning and nearly loses her life, she feels reborn. The Harper family takes full advantage of her new attitude, but whether they can handle it or not remains to be seen.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama gets a crush on her night school teacher (Joseph Campanella) and enlists the family's help to attract his attention.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harper family has more than its hands full when they are asked to watch the Reverend and Mrs. Meechum's 8-year-old grandson. The little brat drives them mad, and when he ends up staying the night, Mama gets irate as only Mama can.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Verna May Rae passes on, Mama finally gets the opportunity to sing "Raytown, O Raytown" on Founder's Day. It's been 50 years since she first auditioned, and this time she will stop at nothing to win.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al and his friends turn No Ma'am into a tax-exempt church.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly accidentally invents a baldness cure with some unusual side effects.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al suffers public scorn when Peggy is declared a hero for taking out a pickpocket.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud takes on wrestler King Kong Bundy as his initiation into 'No Ma'am.'

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly's class reunion becomes the scene for an ex-nerd's revenge.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Marcy is determined to keep Polk High's new football scoreboard from being named after Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al must prove himself a man so his father-in-law will take Peggy's mom back home.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bumped from their fishing lodge cabin, Al and Jefferson seek revenge against actress Shannon Tweed.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) finds out that a popular girl in school likes him, except that she (Cheryl Holdridge) confuses Robbie with Mike (Tim Considine).

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: After Steve visits the office of a potential client, a General whose motto is "Adjust or bust," he experiences many transportation inconveniences and missed connections getting home in time for the General's dinner appointment.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve (Fred MacMurray) enjoys working with a woman engineer (Dorothy Green), who is beautiful. He asks her out for dinner, but she is only interested in work.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The Douglas's stove breaks down on Thanksgiving Day. There's no way to get it fixed that same day and every restaurant in town is booked.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: When Mr. Wilson's money is lost at Quigley's market through a hole in his pocket, he cannot pay Dennis for washing his car - but Dennis misinterprets "the market" to mean stock and assumes Mr. Wilson is broke.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson's article about gypsies is returned with the request that he get to know them better through further research.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis and his school's new principal get off on the wrong foot after the principal takes a remark about his height the wrong way.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Both the Wilsons and the Mitchells take a trip when Mr. Wilson is selected to pick up a chimpanzee from the San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Live My Own Life
programme.desc: Bud feels beleaguered by his parents and siblings, and believes he is ready to take responsibility for his own life.

programme.desc: Jim wants to play badminton, but his kids see him as too old for such things.

programme.desc: Kathy's on a tear, throwing everything she can get her hands on into her new spaceship, a/k/a, the family washing machine.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Thanksgiving Day
programme.desc: When Kathy writes a prize-winning Thanksgiving poem, Jim envisions his Kitten as the next Emily Brontë.

programme.title: Family Affair

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy wants to join a popular group at school, but the group does not think she is right for them.

programme.title: Fantasymphony - A Concert of Fire and Magic

programme.title: La Bayadere

programme.title: Mahler - Rückert Songs

programme.title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in a concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium; Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebrides, Op. 26; Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16.

programme.title: Absolute Prokofiev: The First Concert
